name: sahou
description: Sahou runtime — schema-first typed messaging for creative installations (on Zenoh)

scripts.build:core: wasm-pack build ../../core --release --target nodejs --out-dir ../runtimes/typescript/core/node -- --features wasm && wasm-pack build ../../core --release --target web --out-dir ../runtimes/typescript/core/browser -- --features wasm && rm -f core/node/.gitignore core/browser/.gitignore
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:e2e && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts
